pages.title: Build the Saddle
pages.text: This is the heart of the whole tack room. A vanilla $(item)Saddle$(), a little copper, and a handful of diamonds turns your horse into a proper gear hauler.

pages.title: What It Unlocks
pages.text: Once equipped, the $(item)Upgraded Saddle$() opens five dedicated gear slots: $(thing)Chest$(), $(thing)Hooves$(), $(thing)Medkit$(), $(thing)Stabilizer$(), and $(thing)Hitchpost$(). Most of the mod's equipment starts here.

pages.title: Chest Storage
pages.text: Slide a plain $(item)Chest$() into the chest slot to unlock 27 storage spaces on the horse screen. Empty it before removal unless you want your trail supplies tumbling into the dirt.
